insight.headline: Customer API Changes
insight.what_changed: The Customer Account API version 2026-10 removes the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the associated Checkout type subtree. This change affects apps using the Customer Account API to manage customer data.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their code to ensure it does not rely on the removed fields. They should update their apps to use alternative fields or APIs, such as the Storefront API or GraphQL Admin API, to manage customer checkout data. Additionally, developers should test their apps to ensure compatibility with the updated API version.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience changes in how customer data is managed and displayed in their Shopify stores, potentially affecting their customer's shopping experience.
insight.why_it_matters: This change is important because it affects how customer data is managed and accessed, and developers need to ensure their apps are compatible with the updated API to avoid disruptions to their merchants' businesses.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: The POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 now requires per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. Existing discounts must be updated to represent a per-unit discount.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now allows for more control over breaking changes to action configuration fields, reducing the likelihood of validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates action runtime URLs on every execution, eliminating the need for manual updates.
The CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0, which includes bug fixes and improvements to the uploadToGCS function.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify the use of honest and transparent review practices.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout type subtree have been removed from the Customer Account API as of version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for more granular market configurations.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns a new value, FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED, for orders with no items to fulfill.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The Shop Minis update includes new features such as product variant intents and typed hooks for selecting variants and adding to cart.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to configure shipping options directly in Markets.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0, which includes minor changes to the Oxygen Vite plugin.

recap.headline: Shopify updates impact GraphQL Admin API, Storefront API, and Checkout UI extensions

themes.title: API Updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API 2026-07 now supports MarketRegionSubdivision and OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill. Additionally, the Customer Account API removes the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field in version 2026-10.

themes.title: Checkout and POS Updates
themes.detail: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts and the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07.

themes.title: Shopify Flow and App Store Updates
themes.detail: Shopify Flow now resolves an action’s runtime_url on every execution and action extensions result in fewer breaking changes. The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify honest and transparent review practices.

actions.text: Update POS UI extensions to use per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
Review and update apps to comply with Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3
Prepare for removal of Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field in Customer Account API version 2026-10
